'''竏嗾-ch-z-w''' ('''katachzewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:immute|immute]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-ch-z-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:immute|immute]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗾-ch-z-w
|-
! Lemma
| katachzewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitachzewoko|thitachzewoko]] || [[word:jitachzewoko|jitachzewoko]] || [[word:shitachzewoko|shitachzewoko]] || [[word:kitachzewoko|kitachzewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutachzewoko|thuthutachzewoko]] || [[word:jujutachzewoko|jujutachzewoko]] || [[word:shushutachzewoko|shushutachzewoko]] || [[word:kukutachzewoko|kukutachzewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutachzewoko|thutachzewoko]] || [[word:jutachzewoko|jutachzewoko]] || [[word:shutachzewoko|shutachzewoko]] || [[word:kutachzewoko|kutachzewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutachzewoko|thutachzewoko]] || [[word:jutachzewoko|jutachzewoko]] || [[word:shutachzewoko|shutachzewoko]] || [[word:kutachzewoko|kutachzewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetachzewoko|thetachzewoko]] || [[word:jetachzewoko|jetachzewoko]] || [[word:shetachzewoko|shetachzewoko]] || [[word:ketachzewoko|ketachzewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotachzewoko|thothotachzewoko]] || [[word:jojotachzewoko|jojotachzewoko]] || [[word:shoshotachzewoko|shoshotachzewoko]] || [[word:kokotachzewoko|kokotachzewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotachzewoko|thotachzewoko]] || [[word:jotachzewoko|jotachzewoko]] || [[word:shotachzewoko|shotachzewoko]] || [[word:kotachzewoko|kotachzewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotachzewoko|thotachzewoko]] || [[word:jotachzewoko|jotachzewoko]] || [[word:shotachzewoko|shotachzewoko]] || [[word:kotachzewoko|kotachzewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦtachzewoko|thﾃｦtachzewoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦtachzewoko|jﾃｦtachzewoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦtachzewoko|shﾃｦtachzewoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦtachzewoko|kﾃｦtachzewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatachzewoko|thathatachzewoko]] || [[word:jajatachzewoko|jajatachzewoko]] || [[word:shashatachzewoko|shashatachzewoko]] || [[word:kakatachzewoko|kakatachzewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatachzewoko|thatachzewoko]] || [[word:jatachzewoko|jatachzewoko]] || [[word:shatachzewoko|shatachzewoko]] || [[word:katachzewoko|katachzewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatachzewoko|thatachzewoko]] || [[word:jatachzewoko|jatachzewoko]] || [[word:shatachzewoko|shatachzewoko]] || [[word:katachzewoko|katachzewoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
